title: United Kingdom Photocard Driving Licence Renewal
description: Renew a 10-year photocard driving licence in Great Britain using the official DVLA online service. This document describes the driver number, identity, current address, photo source, and declarations the service collects. It does not submit the renewal; the live driver-vehicle-licensing.service.gov.uk source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md). The renewal fee is intentionally not encoded.

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official GOV.UK 'Renew your driving licence' guidance page. The service confirmation, the £14 online fee (intentionally not encoded as data), the residency-of-Great-Britain eligibility, the rule that you cannot renew online if your name or title has changed, and the requirement to return the old photocard were confirmed against the source; individual input fields reflect the known DVLA online flow but the screen-by-screen field order and labels have not yet been independently captured. The new photo is reused from a valid UK passport record where available, otherwise a new photo path applies. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: drivingLicenceNumber
fields.label: Driving licence number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The 16-character driver number from the front of the current photocard (field 5).
fields.sourceRef: Renew driving licence — Driving licence number

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Must match the name on the current licence; you cannot renew online if your name has changed.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First and middle names
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: nationalInsuranceNumber
fields.label: National Insurance number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two letters, six digits, and a final letter (A-D), without spaces, e.g. QQ123456C. Speeds up identity confirmation.
fields.sourceRef: Renew driving licence — National Insurance number

fields.name: addressLine1
fields.label: Current address — building and street
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The address your new licence should be sent to.

fields.name: addressLine2
fields.label: Current address — second line (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressTown
fields.label: Town or city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: addressPostcode
fields.label: Postcode
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A UK postcode in uppercase, e.g. SW1A 1AA.

fields.name: photoSource
fields.label: Photo for your new licence
fields.description: reuse_passport_photo = let DVLA take the photo and signature from a valid UK passport record (provide passportNumber); new_photo = supply a new photo (e.g. at a Post Office or by post) when no usable passport photo is available.

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: UK passport number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required only when photoSource is 'reuse_passport_photo': the number of a current valid UK passport whose photo and signature DVLA may reuse.
fields.sourceRef: Renew driving licence — Use passport photo

fields.name: noNameOrTitleChange
fields.label: My name and title have not changed
fields.description: Online renewal is only available if your name or title has not changed. Confirm true to use this service; a name or title change must be handled by post.
fields.sourceRef: Renew driving licence — You cannot renew online if your name or title has changed

fields.name: eyesightAndHealthDeclaration
fields.label: I meet the eyesight standard and have declared any notifiable medical conditions
fields.description: Confirm you can meet the legal eyesight requirement and have told DVLA about any medical condition that affects your driving.
